MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL J. RAIFSNIDER, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF NEIL ZARAMA, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY; PAUL BEHREND, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT KEN BRET FISSE, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.
